channel.title: Lex Fridman Podcast
channel.description: Conversations about AI, science, and the nature of intelligence.

item.title: #420 – Sam Altman: The Future of AI
item.description: Sam Altman discusses AGI timelines, safety, and what comes after GPT-5.

item.title: #419 – Andrej Karpathy: Neural Networks from Scratch
item.description: Andrej walks through building neural networks from first principles.
